case_title: COTRAK INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORP. vs. OHM, SUNYOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF COTRAK INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORP. UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT OHM, SUNYOUNG

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-24-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-24-1997, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE STATUS CONFERENCE 2/24/97 AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND AS TO WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND IN ADDITION A $75 SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON PLAINTIFF TO BE PAID PRIOR TO THE 3/26/97 STATUS CONFERENCE. HEARING SET FOR MAR-26-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COTRAK INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT OHM, SUNYOUNG DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-02-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-13-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-02-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED FROM THE 1/2/97 STAT CONF CALENDAR. HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-23-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-23-1997, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), SANCTIONS OF $50 TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR & FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR FEB-24-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-26-1997, DISMISSAL CCP 575.2;CA CASUALTY INDEMNITY INS. CO VS. MENDOZA (1995) 36 CA 4TH 678; BASED ON PLTF'S FAILURES TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONF/ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON 3-26-97, 2-24-97 AND SC ON 1-23-97.
